title: Goodbye Soggy Fries: Cafeteria Unveils Bold New Menu
excerpt: The campus cafeteria reopened Monday with build-your-own bowls, a vegan station, and locally sourced coffee.
author: Mara Lin

title: Caffeine and Code: Inside Campus's All-Night Hackathon
excerpt: More than sixty students powered through a 24-hour coding marathon, fueled by pizza and sheer stubbornness.
author: Devon Park

title: Game On: Student Tournament Draws Record Crowd
excerpt: Two hundred students packed the auditorium for the semester's biggest esports tournament.
author: Aisha Cole
